item.title: 欧盟命令谷歌开放Android人工智能功能，并根据DMA与竞争对手共享搜索数据
item.summary: The European Commission has issued binding measures requiring Alphabet's Google to open key Android features to competing AI assistants and share parts of its Google Search data with rival search engines, marking one of the bloc's most significant efforts yet to curb the market power of Big Tech under the Digital Marke
